From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Pakistani actress

| Azra Aftab | |
| --- | --- |
| عذرا آفتاب | |
| Born | (1958-11-23) 23 November 1958 (age 67)  [Karachi](/wiki/Karachi "Karachi"), [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan") |
| Occupations | * Actress * Radio Artist * Newscaster |
| Years active | 1974 – present |
| Children | 2 |

**Azra Aftab** is a Pakistani actress.[[1]](#cite_note-1) She is known for her roles in dramas *[Dhuwan](/wiki/Dhuwan "Dhuwan")*, *[Manzil](/wiki/Manzil_(Pakistani_TV_series) "Manzil (Pakistani TV series)")*, *[Laag](/wiki/Laag_(TV_series) "Laag (TV series)")*, *[Dasht](/wiki/Dasht_(TV_series) "Dasht (TV series)")* and *[Madiha Maliha](/wiki/Madiha_Maliha "Madiha Maliha")*.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Early life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Azra_Aftab&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Early life")]

Azra was born on 23 November 1958 in [Karachi](/wiki/Karachi "Karachi"), Pakistan. She joined the [Pakistan Television](/wiki/Pakistan_Television_Corporation "Pakistan Television Corporation") (PTV) in 1974 as a newscaster.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Azra_Aftab&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Career")]

She started working as an [Urdu](/wiki/Urdu "Urdu") newscaster on PTV and [Radio Pakistan](/wiki/Radio_Pakistan "Radio Pakistan") in Quetta. Later Azra appeared in dramas on [PTV](/wiki/Pakistan_Television_Corporation "Pakistan Television Corporation") in 1990.[[6]](#cite_note-6)[[7]](#cite_note-7) She was noted for her roles in the dramas *[Laag](/wiki/Laag_(TV_series) "Laag (TV series)")*, *[Manzil](/wiki/Manzil_(Pakistani_TV_series) "Manzil (Pakistani TV series)")*, *[Mohabbat Rooth Jaye Toh](/wiki/Mohabbat_Rooth_Jaye_Toh "Mohabbat Rooth Jaye Toh")*, *[Farz](/wiki/Farz_(TV_series) "Farz (TV series)")*, *Hazaron Khwahishen*, and *[Aasmanon Pay Likha](/wiki/Aasmanon_Pay_Likha "Aasmanon Pay Likha")*.[[8]](#cite_note-8) She also appeared in the dramas *[Khuda Zameen Se Gaya Nahin](/wiki/Khuda_Zameen_Se_Gaya_Nahin "Khuda Zameen Se Gaya Nahin")*, *Kaghaz Kay Phool*, *Ek Sitam Aur Sahi*, *Aankh Bhar Asman* and *Chalo Phir Se Jee Kar Dekhain*.[[9]](#cite_note-9) Since then she appeared in dramas *[Dil Awaiz](/wiki/Dil_Awaiz "Dil Awaiz")*, *Pul Sirat*, *[Pinjra](/wiki/Pinjra_(2017_TV_series) "Pinjra (2017 TV series)")*, *Kaise Huaye Benaam*, *Lakhon Mein Aik*, *[Bhai](/wiki/Bhai_(TV_series) "Bhai (TV series)")* and *[Bari Bahu](/wiki/Bari_Bahu "Bari Bahu")*.[[10]](#cite_note-10)[[11]](#cite_note-11)[[12]](#cite_note-12)
